overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a white-haired character walking through a dark nighttime landscape illuminated by a handheld torch. The journey progresses from an enclosed grassy trail through open fields and finally approaches ancient stone ruins and a stone building.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail enclosed by vegetation and bushes, with white standing stone markers visible along the sides. The torch provides the primary light source in the dark environment, illuminating the grass and path ahead.

events.description: trail opens up from enclosed vegetation to wide grassland with visible starry sky

agents.ego_description: continues walking through the open field with the torch illuminating the path ahead

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with visible stars and scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to wide open grassland with full visibility of the starry night sky above. The character continues walking along the dirt trail, leaving the enclosed vegetation and stone markers behind.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an area with ancient stone ruins, walking between tall stone pillars and wall fragments. A large stone building with illuminated windows becomes visible ahead and grows larger as the character approaches, passing a wooden cart on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark nighttime landscape that transitions from an enclosed trail into an open field and finally toward ancient ruins. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path flanked by dense vegetation and white standing stone markers, with a handheld torch providing the primary light source. As the character moves forward, the enclosing bushes fall away and the scene opens into wide grassland under a clear, starry night sky. The camera then follows the trail into an area of ancient stone ruins, passing between tall pillars and wall fragments. Finally, the path leads past a wooden cart toward a large stone building with illuminated windows that grows larger as the character approaches.
